messages.content: ok so I was thinking about the anniversary
i know i need to figure something out
COSTA RICA
eco lodge on the beach. zip lining. volcano hike. 🔥
lol no i mean it. tasha would love that
RIGHT and its not even that expensive
like 3k for a week including flights
ok lemme do some research. ill report back
yesss this is gonna be SO good 🙌
what if we got a dog
for real. as a surprise for tasha
thinking a hound mix? she always stops to pet the hounds at johnny steele
omg wait look at this one
found it on instagram. houston rescue
ur literally gonna be a dog mom 🔥
i started a notion page lol. supplies are gonna be like $340
right? ok gonna research rescues this week
this is so exciting oh my god 🙌
some treats and a couple toys
and i looked at crate sizes in person
calm down im just doing research
u literally bought dog toys destiny
thats not research thats shopping 💀
i need to see what kind of treats work for hound mixes ok
the 42 inch crate looked right tho
yea thats what the rescue site said for medium hounds
tasha would have had so many questions if she was there lol
nah its on the freedom flex she never checks that one
gonna go back for the crate once maya confirms the home visit
ok so flights and lodge are booked
need to figure out the cover story tho
lol yes i went on a booking spree last week. check ur email i forwarded the lodge
ok ok so for the cover story
what if we say its a girls weekend
like were going to austin or something
that could work. tasha wont question it
can you put a decoy on ur calendar too just in case
done. adding girls weekend austin march 13-20
omggg tasha is gonna LOSE IT when she finds out 💀
where should i take tasha for valentines
actually nice. like real date night nice
the gulf coast tasting menu is 🔥
oh thats perfect. tasha has been wanting to try it
book it TODAY tho valentines fills up fast
on it. also im getting her a custom sketch of johnny steele framed
she is going to lose it
YESSS 🙌🙌 yall are gonna have the best night
frame shipped. should get here thursday
yeah. hiding it in the trunk lol
lmaoo smart. tasha would definately find it
flight is 8:15am march 13. need to be at IAH by 6
under the girls weekend thing right
exactly. youre dropping me off for the girls weekend flight except tasha is coming too
and i reveal at the gate
THIS IS LIKE A MOVIE 😂
wait but tasha wont have a bag packed??
im packing for her. gonna sneak her stuff into my big suitcase the night before
you are insane and i love it 🙌🔥
its gonna be worth it trust me!!
dinner in an hour. why am i nervous lol
girl youve been married for almost 5 years 😂
lol ok thanks for the rec
it was so good. she loved the sketch too
he just sat in my lap the whole time
i saw!! he was SO chill
tasha is going to lose her mind
ok but how are u gonna keep this secret
ur the worst at secrets 💀
excuse me im keeping the costa rica thing just fine
ANYWAY. maya said next step is a home visit
need to schedule it. has to be when tasha is on nights and sleeping
ill figure out her shift schedule and email maya
maya can do march 24 at 11am
tasha working that day?
night shift the 23rd-25th. shell be asleep til like 2pm
i need to deep clean the apartment the night before tho
ill come over the 23rd after tasha leaves for work
ok but also ur leaving for the thing in like 5 days
i KNOW. too many secrets happening at once
ur literally a spy at this point 💀
pickup at 5am. please do NOT be late
flight is at 8:15 gotta be there by 6
does tasha suspect anything??
nope. she thinks im going to austin with you
packed her bag while she was at work. its in the trunk already
ok setting like 4 alarms
im so excited for you guys 🥹🔥
BISCUIT???
YES!! maya just emailed
YOURE GONNA BE A DOG MOM
i literally cried at my desk lol
ok so when do u get him
whenever we want. i want to do the reveal this weekend
johnny steele. ill suggest we go for a walk and biscuit will just be there
who brings biscuit
maya said a volunteer can meet us there with him
oh my god this is perfect
tasha has NO idea 💀
zero. she thinks we just go to the park for fun
best week ever. first costa rica now this
ur on a ROLL 🔥🔥
i cant believe this is happening
39 looks good on you
im getting old dest 💀
girl stop. hey tasha wants to take u to breakfast, u free?
YES omg tell her im ready whenever!!
shes heading to you now 😊
hey u see that montrose art walk email?
april 19 starts at 5. food trucks live music galleries
thats literally our neighborhood lol
wait is tasha coming
nah shes on nights that weekend
aw 😞 more art for us tho!!
meet at westheimer and montrose around 5?
ok heading out in like 15
same!! just finishing my hair
meet at the cvs corner?
ooh get some pics of me looking artsy 📸
omw parking was a nightmare 😂
home!! that was SO fun
agreed. those tacos from the green truck tho
and that glass jellyfish sculpture
i almost let u buy that lol. $400 corinne
IT SPOKE TO ME 💀💀
lol night. we're doing the fall one too
already on my calendar!! night 😘
dude i think im gonna take tasha to costa rica for our anniversary
No way. That's a big move. When's the anniversary again?
march 15. thinking march 13-20
She's going to love that. Have you been before?
no but corinne went a couple years ago and wont shut up about it lol
So you spent three hours making a spreadsheet to decide between Costa Rica and Cancun.
it was two hours and it was a notion page tyvm
Of course it was. 😂 Well I think it's a great idea. Tasha deserves it.
dont say anything to anyone obviously
Your secret's safe. I barely talk to anyone anyway.
hey you around
Yeah, what's up?
ok so corinnes bday is april 8
shes turning 39
i wanna do a birthday brunch for her
That's a great idea. Where are you thinking?
the breakfast klub
shes been obsessed with their wings and waffles since forever
Can't argue with that. Who else is coming?
me you tasha and a couple of her work friends. party of 6
Count me in. Do you need a reservation?
its breakfast klub on a wednesday lol yes
also thinking we do a group gift. spa gift card maybe?
Spa gift card is solid. She's always talking about needing a day off.
exactly. ill handle the reservation and the card. venmo me later for your share
Deal. Just send me the time when you have it.
ok brunch update
wednesday 11am breakfast klub. reservation confirmed
Got it. Coming from midtown, I can be there by 10:50.
perfect. i wanna get there before corinne
tasha is bringing her. told corinne theyre just getting breakfast
Classic. She really has no idea?
zero lol
What about the gift card?
got it already. hidalgo spa, $75 from the group
can you venmo me 25 when you get a chance
Sent. You should have it.
got it 🙏
heading to breakfast klub now
Leaving now. Parking on Travis?
yep the spot around teh corner usually works
Here. Grabbed a table in the back.
tasha just texted theyre 5 min away
She just walked in and screamed. 😂 Mission accomplished.
hey btw whatever happened with that recruiter? the apex thing
been meaning to ask. you still thinking about it or nah
u free this weekend?
we gotta hit the lake fr 🎣
lake conroe duh
my boy has a boat we can use
that sounds fun ngl
right?? bass season is fire rn 🔥
lemme check my schedule and get back to u
dont take too long tho weather is perfect rn 💪🏾
lol ok ill lyk
so we doing the lake thing or what
ugh i really want to but im super busy with a work deadline rn
bruh u always busy
i know 😭 its this big project at work
aight well after the holidays then?
yeah that works lets plan for after holidays
cool ima hold u to that 🎣
january is halfway done
lake conroe misses u
lmao the lake does not miss me
ok i miss u then 😂
nah but fr when can we go
january is just packed for me
work stuff plus some personal things
yeah yeah im fine just busy season
aight just lmk when ur free
i will i promise
ok D im not letting this go
u said after holidays
then u said january
we are WAY past both 💀
lol ur so dramatic
im deadass tho
weather is about to be perfect
ok ok ur right
let me figure out a good weekend
for real this time?
for real this time
ok bryce
how about april 12
FINALLY 🎣🔥💪🏾
april 12 is locked
im gonna get everything set up
rods bait cooler the whole nine
lol youve been planning this for months huh
u have no idea cuz
this is gonna be so good
looking forward to it fr
YO cuz
so the april 12 thing was cool but way too short. my boy found a guide who does FULL day trips on conroe — like 5am to 7pm. everything included
hes got openings in june. i was thinking june 14. we could make a whole weekend out of it — camp out, fish all day, grill what we catch
you good for a full day out there? no excuses this time 💪🏾😤
hey love you eat dinner yet?
not yet was about to make that chicken thing
ok save me some im getting off at 11
oh also bryce has been texting me about going fishing at lake conroe
that boy stays trying to get you outside
maybe in the spring. too busy rn
thats probably smart. its gonna be cold on the water in december anyway
im on my phone hotspot and its so slow
again?? didnt it just go out like 2 months ago
yes and they charged us for the visit last time
ugh. well at least you can still work right
barely. cant load anything bigger than a google doc
lol babe just do what you can. im about to crash
update they said someone coming between 2 and 4
hopefully before 3 bc i have a bunch of stuff to finish
line issue outside. no charge this time
oh good one less thing to deal with
gonna actually get some work done now that i have real internet
hey love how was your day
went for a ride around hermann park
the weather was perfect for it
jealous. i slept all day lol
true. its so pretty over there this time of year
it really is, barely anyone out
yeah made that stir fry from the other night
left u some in the fridge
babe you're the best ❤️ gonna eat and head out, shift starts at 11
hey so the honda needs its 30k service
oh already? feels like you just got that car
i know right. its at like 29800 miles
anyway i scheduled it for monday morning at 8
can you follow me there and bring me home
yeah thats fine. im off monday
they said itll probably be done around 4
so you need me to pick you up too?
of course babe. just text me when its ready
what all are they doing to it
oil change tire rotation brake inspection. the usual 30k stuff
how much is that gonna run
ugh. car ownership is a scam
omw. be there in like 15
k im by the front entrance
its so heavy oh my god
lol did you try to carry it inside by yourself
ok but where should we put it
yeah that has the best light and its closest to the outlet
babe we'll figure it out. just put it by the window
ok fine. also we need a lamp and cable management
the cables back there are embarassing
already looking. theres a lamp for $13 and a cable tray for $15
just get both. $30 is nothing compared to that desk lol
so everything is here now. desk lamp cables
desk is still in teh box in the hall
yes. i wanna start at 9
thats not early thats just morning lol
fine. ill make coffee and we'll start at 9
ive been watching assembly videos on youtube
we have the drill from the bookshelf so we should be good ❤️
wait that looks really good. the bamboo top with the lamp is perfect
ok i take it back. you were right about the bamboo
the cable tray was a game changer
it really was. no more cord spaghetti behind the desk
ive been standing for like an hour
you said you were gonna switch between sitting and standing
yeah just made coffee whats up
so they just told us memorial hermann is switching all night shift to a 3-on-4-off rotation starting the 16th
like 3 nights on then 4 off?
yeah and its rotating so it wont be the same days every week
im honestly not sure how i feel about it. 4 off sounds nice but the rotating is gonna mess things up
does that mean no more guaranteed weekends off
basically. some weeks ill have them some weeks i wont
ok we need to figure this out. ill look at the calendar tonight
lol youre already planning 🙄 love you im gonna crash. been up since 6pm yesterday
ok so ive been thinking about the schedule thing all day
thats gonna be the hardest part
i know. i was thinking about that before i fell asleep this morning
like we JUST got into a good rhythm with friday dinner and saturday dog park
babe i know but other nurses have been on rotating for a while and they make it work
did they say why theyre switching
something about staffing balance and burnout reduction. honestly it makes sense on paper
ok but whose burnout does it reduce because mine is increasing
lmao babe you dont even work at the hospital
🙄 well ill get the actual rotation calendar tomorrow and then we can figure everything out
ok good. im already making a spreadsheet
why am i not surprised ❤️
ok so i updated the calendar
couldnt sleep so i did it at like 2am lol
your first rotation starts the 16th right
yeah. on mon tue wed off thu thru sun
ok i moved date night to thursday the 19th since youll be off
and dog park saturday morning the 21st
that works. what about the week after
23 24 25 youre on again so no date night that week
yeah thats fine. ill be a zombie those days anyway
then youre off the 26th thru march 1st. i put date night saturday the 28th
and dog park sunday the 1st
sounds good. we should do brunch that sunday too
YES brunch then dog park after
thats a lot of activity before noon on a sunday lol
babe. its brunch AND dog park before noon
lets just play it by ear. calendar is a guide not a contract 🙄
fine but im keeping the spreadsheet
got new handlebar tape and they trued the wheels
not bad for a full tune up
yeah they were really thorough. checked the brakes, adjusted the derailleurs, whole thing
nice. you gonna ride this weekend?
babe im not waking up at 7am on a saturday to ride a bike
ill be here with coffee when you get back ❤️
hey babe my coworker sarah is planning a costa rica trip with her girlfriend and wants to know where we stayed
can you forward me the booking confirmation email? she wants to see the room options and pricing. her email is sarah.j.martinez@gmail.com if its easier to just send it straight to her
im in! saving a table?
ill get there early and grab the corner booth
nice. wont be there til like 7:15
also we need a strategy for the science round
that almost killed us last time
girl we WON last time
lol here she goes
contrarian about our own wins 😂
im just saying we should be prepared
ur literally the most
ok team. tonight is huge
7 months undefeated if we win
im not jinxing it im stating facts
destiny the trivia coach 😂
whats the theme
i thiink its decades. 80s 90s 2000s
oh we got this
90s is literally my entire personality
brush up on 80s movies just in case
i hate yall
see u there 🧠
we absolutely crushed the music round
DESTROYED IT 🔥🔥
teh motown question tho
nina carried that whole round
ty ty 🙌
ok but the geography one
who even knew that
i literally thought u were wrong
have i ever been wrong
do u want a list
ANYWAY. winning streak continues
how long is it now
were literally birthing a legacy 💀
weird but ok
same time next week?
np ill be there like 2:15
i can grab u. im right off montrose
omg thank u
ok yall first game is saturday
3pm memorial park field 4
nice. what positions is everyone playing
im at first base. andre ur pitching right
yep
keisha short stop
u already know
tamika catching. destiny where u want
left field works
cool jerseys are blue btw
ill bring em saturday
what time should we get there
2:30 to warm up
parking?
theres a lot off memorial dr
bet
lets get this W
2-1 BABY 🔥
that double in the 5th tho
we looked good out there ngl
told yall
game day yall. 3pm memorial park
who can give me a ride today. car is in the shop 😩
where u at
montrose
dont be late we playing the blue jays today
lol every game is a big game to u
bc they ARE
omw
keisha whats ur address
2415 westheimer
got it see u soon
ok valentines is saturday whats everyones plan
taking tash somewhere nice 😏
oh?? babe you have been acting suspicious all week lol
its called being romantic look it up
LMAOO
tash shes been stressing over this for like two weeks just let her cook
fine fine i trust you babe ❤️
HAPPY VALENTINES to my fav couple 😍😍
happy valentines corinne! you doing anything fun tonight?
happy v day cor! what are u up to
wine and trash tv honestly
now go be cute and stop texting me 🥰
ok so last night was amazing. babe took me to underbelly and got me a custom sketch of johnny steele dog park framed 😭❤️
STOPPP that is so cute i literally cant
the dog park sketch tho 🐶😏
glad u liked it babe 😊
great taste in restaurants. questionable taste in trivia team names
THE CONTRARIANS IS ICONIC TAKE THAT BACK
omggg I'm so excited about everything coming up!!
RIGHT trivia season is going to be SO good this year
oh DEFINITELY 🧠🔥
i heard toasted coconut is doing a new bonus round format
wait seriously?? we need to strategize
lol you two are extra today
trivia is serious business tash
sure babe 🙄
she doesnt understand the grind des 😤
we're defending a streak here!!
ok ladies whats the plan for saturday
im off!! finally. destiny what are we doing
destiny you said you had a thing saturday morning right? or was that something else
hey girl!! is this still your number? its nicole from TSU
we should catch up sometime! im in houston now
Hi this is Mike from Reliable Repairs. Confirming your appointment Saturday 11/15 at 10am for the garbage disposal
confirmed thanks
All done. Let me know if you have any issues
Has anyone else noticed the hallway lights on 3rd floor are out again?
yeah been like that since tuesday
I emailed the property manager. Will update when I hear back
thanks karen
Fixed! They replaced the bulbs this morning
happy hour friday at kirby ice house? 5:30?
im in!
nice. see yall there
anyone down for a memorial park loop saturday morning? thinking 7am
im in
what pace?
chill. 14-15 mph
bet
Reminder: You have an appointment with Dr. Patel on 2/19/2026 at 9:00 AM. Reply C to confirm or R to reschedule.
C
Thank you! Your appointment is confirmed. Please arrive 10 minutes early.
FedEx: Your package has been delivered to 1847 Branard St, Houston TX. Tracking: 784930261592
internet has been dropping every 20 min for 2 days
Hi Destiny! I'm sorry about that. There is an outage in your area that should be resolved by 3 PM today. We'll send a confirmation when service is restored.
ok thanks
The outage in your area has been resolved. Please restart your modem. If issues persist reply HELP.
T-Mobile: Your bill of $85.00 is ready. Due 3/22. Pay at t-mobile.com/pay or in the T-Mobile app.
Your H-E-B Curbside order #4821 is ready for pickup at the Montrose location. Pull into a numbered spot and check in on the app.
thanks
Hi Destiny, your 2021 Honda Civic is due for an oil change and tire rotation. Call us at 713-555-0900 to schedule.
Hi Destiny! Early voting for the Harris County bond election starts Nov 3. Find your polling location at harrisvotes.com. Reply STOP to opt out.
Torchy's: Taco of the Month is back! Try the Brushfire for $4.99 this March. Show this text for a free queso at Houston locations.
LA Fitness: New year, new goals! Refer a friend in January and get one month free. Ask at the front desk for details.
hey D long time no talk. saw your post about the montrose farmers market. we should grab coffee sometime and catch up for real
Your Catalina Coffee reward is ready! You've earned a free drip coffee. Show this text at checkout. Expires 12/31.
hey destiny! hope youre doing well. i left clearpoint last month and im at datashift now. would you be willing to be a reference if i need one down the road?
hey! congrats on the move. yeah absolutely just let me know
thank you so much! ill keep you posted
Progressive: Your auto policy renewal is coming up on 5/5/2026. Log in to review your coverage and premium at progressive.com.
Your Uber Eats order from Pho Saigon is on its way! Estimated delivery: 7:45 PM
Your order has been delivered. Enjoy your meal! Rate your experience in the app.
Hi baby. Just wanted to check on you and Tasha. Your mama said yall might come down for Christmas? Let me know so I can plan
hey auntie! were still figuring it out. ill let you know by next week
Ok sounds good. Love you both
